prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-URAASATKFD-A-IR-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 100pc Assorted Grit Grinding and Sanding Abrasive Stone Burrs, 1/8" Shank Compatible with Dremel Rotary Tools Description: The ToolTreaux abrasive stone burrs set comes with 100 assorted sanding and grinding burrs that are designed to fit most standard dremel and rotary tools. These burrs are ideal for sanding and grinding a variety of materials including glass, ceramics, gemstones and more.

Our 100 piece abrasive burr set includes 6 different common burr shapes for a variety of projects: 40 wheels, 20 cylinders, 10 rounded cylinders, 10 tapered cylinders, 10 bullets and 10 cones. All of the included burrs feature a 1/8“ shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools, making this a must-have set of dremel accessories.

All of the abrasive stone burrs are made of high-quality materials: the green burrs are made from monoxide and the pink and grey burrs are made of aluminum, both of which are great for grinding and sanding the above mentioned materials. Make sure you have a set of abrasive stone burrs before your next rotary tool project. Search Terms: abrasive rotary wheels rotary tools tools accessories grinding wheel sanding wheel sanding tool grinding tool cutting discs rotary cutter rotary tool rotary cutter for fabric nail drill drill bit set cordless drill drill set Features: - BURRS FOR PRECISION ROTARY TOOLS: ToolTreaux abrasive stone burrs set comes with 100 assorted grinding and sanding burrs that will fit all standard precision rotary and dremel tools; ideal for high speed sanding and grinding of ceramics, glass, gems, stones and more - ASSORTED SHAPES: 100pc kit includes 6 different burr shapes: 40 wheels, 20 cylinders, 10 rounded cylinders, 10 tapered cylinders, 10 cones and 10 bullets for a variety of uses - 1/8 INCH SHANK: All of the included burrs feature a 1/8 inch mandrel shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools; Must-have sanding and grinding accessories for dremel owners - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Abrasive stone burrs are made of high-quality materials; pink and grey burrs are made from aluminum and green burrs are made from monoxide; ideal construction for grinding and sanding - SPECIFICATIONS: Number of pieces: 100; Materials: aluminum, stone, monoxide; Compatibility: fits most standard rotary and dremel tools; Shank size: 1/8“; Foam storage case included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 100pc Assorted Grit Grinding Sanding Burrs

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 100pc Abrasive Stone Burrs for Rotary Tools

tokens.name: Abrasive Stone Burrs For Rotary Tools

openai.title_differentiation: 100 Assorted Shapes, 18" Shank, Fits Dremel Tools, Sanding And Grinding Glass Ceramic Gems, Foam Case
